session.user: Run `ruff check --fix src/erk/cli/commands/pr/check_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/duplicate_check_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/log_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py` to auto-fix the import sorting issues. session.assistant: I'll run the ruff commands to auto-fix and verify the import sorting issues.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check --fix src/erk/cli/commands/pr/check_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close...[truncated 51 chars]...ands/pr/list_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/log_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py

session.assistant: Now verifying the entire pr/ directory is clean:

tool_use.param: Verify all import sorting issues are resolved in pr/ directory

session.assistant:
